features.description: ChClient dead code removed: debug field, #[allow(dead_code)], and inner() getter

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c '#\[allow(dead_code)\]' src/clickhouse/client.rs; grep -c 'pub fn inner' src/clickhouse/client.rs; grep -c 'debug: bool' src/clickhouse/client.rs
layers.description: No #[allow(dead_code)], no pub fn inner, no debug: bool in ChClient struct
layers.fail_message: Dead code still present in ChClient

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation failed after ChClient dead code removal

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test -p chbackup 2>&1 | grep -E '^test result:' | head -1
layers.fail_message: Tests failed after ChClient dead code removal

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pure dead-code removal with no behavioral change; compilation and test pass verify correctness

features.description: S3Client dead code removed: inner(), concurrency(), object_disk_path() methods and concurrency/object_disk_path fields

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -n 'pub fn inner\|pub fn concurrency\|pub fn object_disk_path\|concurrency: u32\|object_disk_path: String' src/storage/s3.rs | grep -v '//\|#\[' | wc -l | tr -d ' '
layers.description: No dead getter methods or dead fields remain in S3Client
layers.fail_message: Dead code still present in S3Client

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation failed after S3Client dead code removal

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test -p chbackup 2>&1 | grep -E '^test result:' | head -1
layers.fail_message: Tests failed after S3Client dead code removal

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pure dead-code removal with no behavioral change; compilation and test pass verify correctness

features.description: Dead attach_parts() function removed from restore/attach.rs

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c '#\[allow(dead_code)\]' src/restore/attach.rs; grep -c 'pub async fn attach_parts(' src/restore/attach.rs
layers.description: No #[allow(dead_code)] and no attach_parts() function definition in attach.rs
layers.fail_message: Dead attach_parts() function or #[allow(dead_code)] still present

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test -p chbackup 2>&1 | grep -E '^test result:' | head -1

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pure dead-code removal with no behavioral change; compilation and test pass verify correctness

features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for all modified modules (clickhouse, storage, restore)

layers.name: structural
layers.command: test -f src/clickhouse/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/storage/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/restore/CLAUDE.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL
layers.fail_message: One or more CLAUDE.md files missing

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: for m in src/clickhouse src/storage src/restore; do grep -q 'Parent Context' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Directory Structure' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Key Patterns' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Parent Rules' "$m/CLAUDE.md" || exit 1; done && echo VALID

alternative_verification.command: for m in src/clickhouse src/storage src/restore; do test -f "$m/CLAUDE.md" || exit 1; done && echo PASS
